TraderProposal.reasoning: Overweight recommendation implies bullish outlook on BTC-USD. Entry timed near current market levels with 5% stop-loss buffer. Position sized conservatively due to crypto volatility. Note: Specific rationale missing in original plan - assumptions based on standard overweight interpretation.
TraderProposal.position_sizing: 10-15% of portfolio allocation with dollar-cost averaging over 3 entries

PortfolioDecision.executive_summary: Maintain BTC exposure with tightened risk controls: widen stop-loss to 12%, reduce position size by 50%, add put option hedges, and enforce ≤2% portfolio allocation cap. Avoid aggressive entry until regulatory clarity emerges.
PortfolioDecision.investment_thesis: BTC's asymmetric risk-reward profile (20% bear case probability vs. 20% upside) and structural volatility (80% historical drawdowns) necessitate defensive positioning. While macro tailwinds (institutional adoption, ETF inflows) support medium-term upside, regulatory uncertainty and liquidity fragility require active hedging and strict capital preservation protocols. Current 5% stop-loss is obsolete given gap-down risks exceeding 20% in stress scenarios.
